daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded and magnetic rn. The cosmos is rewarding your patience with unexpected momentum. Trust the slow burn—magic happens when you stop forcing it and just exist authentically.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the quiet confidence you've been building. Whether single or coupled, today asks you to show up as your real self, not the polished version. Vulnerability hits different when it's genuine.
daily.career: Your creative energy is *chef's kiss* today. That idea you've been sitting on? The universe is nudging you to share it. Your persistence has been noticed, and doors are subtly opening.
daily.health: Your body's asking for rest that actually feels nourishing, not just scrolling in bed. Move if it feels good, pause if it doesn't. Listen to what your nervous system needs—it knows.

weekly.overview: Mercury's got your back this week, Taurus. Your vibe is shifting from introspective to outward-focused, making it the perfect time to share what you've been cooking up. Trust the momentum.
weekly.love: There's a tenderness in the air around you. Whether you're coupled or solo, someone's noticing your energy. Don't overthink it—just be your authentic self and let things unfold naturally.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Your confidence is contagious, and people are genuinely interested in what you're building.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and less numbing. Take walks, stretch, dance—whatever feels good. Your nervous system wants grounding rituals. Self-care isn't selfish; it's necessary.
